test_groups.title: Valid credit card numbers without provider
test_groups.rationale: Tests generic credit card validation without specifying a provider. Includes valid and invalid numbers based on length and format.

test_groups.title: Valid credit card numbers with provider
test_groups.rationale: Tests credit card validation for Visa provider. Includes valid Visa numbers and invalid numbers from other providers.

test_groups.title: Invalid provider option
test_groups.rationale: Tests behavior when an invalid provider is specified. Should throw an error or fail validation.

test_groups.title: Edge cases for formatting
test_groups.rationale: Tests handling of formatted credit card numbers with valid separators (spaces and dashes) and invalid separators.

test_groups.title: Empty and non-numeric inputs
test_groups.rationale: Tests behavior with empty strings, non-numeric inputs, and mixed alphanumeric inputs.
